message: Cheer100 Hey Rich how's it going you bald birdman , can we watch John Campea video! He breaks down how those news outlets reporting "600k dislikes" on Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey trailer are completely wrong. The "Return YouTube Dislike" extension doesn't have actual YouTube data—it just uses a crazy multiplier based on its own tiny user base (0.2% of users) to make a magical, inflated guess! Would love to hear your take on stream!
